title: OpsxState
description: Per-change lifecycle state for the OpenSpec SDD workflow. Created by /opsx:propose, updated by each /opsx:* command, consumed by /opsx:archive and future tooling.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes to this file.

changeName.description: Kebab-case change name, must match openspec/changes/<name>/ directory.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the state file was first written (typically at /opsx:propose time).

proposedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when /opsx:propose completed and all required artifacts were produced.

reviewedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when /opsx:review last completed successfully for this change. Null means review has not run.

reviewWaived.description: True if the user explicitly waived the pre-apply review gate. Used together with reviewWaiveReason.

reviewWaiveReason.description: Free-form rationale when reviewWaived is true. Null when reviewWaived is false.

appliedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when /opsx:apply began (first task transitioned from [ ] to [x]).

verifiedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when /opsx:verify last completed. Null until the first verify run.

verifyStatus.description: Status of the most recent /opsx:verify run. READY = no blockers. READY_WITH_WARNINGS = deferred or manual actions exist but archive is allowed. BLOCKED = CRITICAL findings remain. BLOCKED_LOOP = triage loop exhausted iterations. RECONSTRUCTED = report produced by /osx:backfill-verify for a legacy change.

verifyIterations.description: Number of triage-loop iterations executed by the most recent /opsx:verify run. 0 until the first run.

lastVerifyReportPath.description: Relative path (from the change directory) to the most recently written verify report. Typically 'verify-report.md'.

archivedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when /opsx:archive moved the change directory into openspec/changes/archive/YYYY-MM-DD-<name>/.

prUrl.description: GitHub PR URL created by /opsx:archive. Null until archive runs.

prNumber.description: GitHub PR number. Null until archive runs.

id.description: Internal deferred-work identifier assigned by /opsx:verify (finding-ID hash).

number.description: GitHub issue number created by /opsx:archive for this deferred work entry.

url.description: Full URL of the GitHub issue.

findingId.description: Matches the finding ID in verify-report.md so archive can deep-link back.

deferredIssues.description: Record of GitHub issues created from Deferred Work entries during /opsx:archive. Empty array until issues are created.

id.description: Internal manual-action identifier assigned by /opsx:verify (finding-ID hash).

number.description: GitHub issue number created by /opsx:archive for this manual action entry.

url.description: Full URL of the GitHub issue.

findingId.description: Matches the finding ID in verify-report.md so archive can deep-link back.

manualActionIssues.description: Record of GitHub issues created from Manual Actions Required entries during /opsx:archive. Empty array until issues are created.
